title: Festivities
body:
Celebrate the holidays from within Minecraft!

As of right now, this mod only contains features relating Christmas, but I plan to add features for other holidays in the future!

For starters, Christmas takes effect during all of December. Halloween also takes effect during all of October.

# Christmas
During Christmas, the music from the Festive Mashup Pack will play. (Flake, Kyoto)

Many mobs celebrate Christmas by decorating themselves with their textures from the Festive Mashup Pack! They will also wear colored Jolly Hats.

Villagers will throw players Christmas goodies, such as Sugar Cookies and Fruitcake. Rarely, Giftboxes.

Giftboxes give you access to Giftmakers, a new profession of villager. They sell Christmas items, including a Magic Snowglobe which allows you to enable Christmas at any time.
